name: Iron Golem
languages: Understands Common plus two other languages but can't speak

traits.name: Fire Absorption
traits.description: Whenever the golem is subjected to Fire damage, it regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Fire damage dealt.

traits.name: Magic Resistance
traits.description: The golem has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The golem makes two attacks, using Bladed Arm or Fiery Bolt in any combination.

actions.name: Bladed Arm
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +12, reach 10 ft. Hit: 20 (3d8 + 7) Slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) Fire damage.

actions.name: Fiery Bolt
actions.description: Ranged Attack Roll: +10, range 120 ft. Hit: 36 (8d8) Fire damage.

actions.name: Poison Breath (Recharge 6)
actions.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 18, each creature in a 60-foot Cone. Failure: 55 (10d10) Poison damage. Success: Half damage.

tactical_info.environment: Wizard towers, ancient ruins, magical laboratories, treasure vaults
tactical_info.tactics: Uses fire absorption to heal from fire attacks, alternates between melee bladed arms and ranged fiery bolts, poison breath for area control
tactical_info.weaknesses: Slow movement, low dexterity, vulnerable to cold-based attacks, no healing except fire absorption
